name: VentureOne

verdict.text: Keep — free entry to Miles, though 1.25x lags flat cash-back cards

earn_rates.category: Hotels, vacation rentals, rental cars & activities — via Capital One Travel

earn_note: 1.25× is below the Freedom Unlimited's 1.5% or Blue Cash Everyday's 1%-plus-bonus-categories on pure cash value, but VentureOne's miles carry transfer-partner upside that flat cash back never can.

points.note: The only truly no-fee card in Capital One's lineup with full transfer-partner access — Quicksilver and other no-fee Capital One cards are pure cash back capped at 1¢.

transfer_partners.highlight: Same 18 airline + 4 hotel partner chart as Venture and Venture X, at the same ratios — Capital One doesn't restrict transfer access by card tier.
transfer_partners.recent_changes: JAL Mileage Bank, Qatar Airways Privilege Club, and I Prefer Hotel Rewards added Sept 2025, shared across the whole Capital One Miles lineup.

insurance.detail: Secondary only — pays after your personal auto insurance
Not advertised as a standalone benefit
Not listed on the current cardholder page — confirm against your Cardholder Benefits Guide before relying on it
Not listed on the current cardholder page — confirm against your Cardholder Benefits Guide before relying on it

protection_note: This is Capital One's most stripped-down travel card — only secondary rental CDW is clearly confirmed. Purchase protection and extended warranty aren't advertised the way they are for the standard Venture card; verify against your Cardholder Benefits Guide and use a card with confirmed purchase protection for big-ticket items.
rental_note: Secondary only — your personal auto insurance pays first, and this covers the gap (deductible, loss-of-use, towing) if you decline the rental counter's own CDW.

status_perks.name: Hertz Five Star
status_perks.note: Complimentary mid-tier Hertz Gold Plus Rewards status, same as the standard Venture card.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: Zero FX fees on purchases made outside the US.

services.name: Discover network transition
services.detail: New VentureOne accounts are being originated on the Discover network instead of Visa as of early 2026 — existing cards keep Visa until reissue.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users

benefits.text: No lounge access either way — nothing lost by adding one

additional_cards.note: Free to add, and since this card has no lounge access or premium perks to gate, there's little downside to adding trusted users.

timeline.text: New VentureOne accounts are being issued on the Discover network instead of Visa; existing cards keep Visa until reissue.
JAL Mileage Bank, Qatar Airways Privilege Club, and I Prefer Hotel Rewards added as transfer partners, shared across the whole Capital One Miles lineup including VentureOne.
